create_final_preview_hint: Same size as cards in the home feed (not scaled down). Review here, then publish below.
create_section_ai_cover_hint: After choosing a venue, add optional notes for Gemini. Generation sends vibe as tone, venue type as scene, then this text as context.
create_section_ai_gateway_hint: Full pack: Gemini proposes title, message, theme, font, motion, and a text-free hero with a clear center area for overlays.
create_section_geo_search_note: Use DineBuddies venues or Google Places; city and country context refine suggestions.
create_section_venue_location_hint: Pick a place and venue category — this drives the hero background; vibe above drives tone and copy.
create_section_vibe_hint: Sets tone for AI cover, text, and motion — separate from venue category below.
